full_text:
Huchuquan 呼廚泉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huchuquan (呼廚泉). Helped Gao Gan against Zhong Yao then kept hostage by Wei after 216. Title died with him. Huchuquan was affiliated with Xiongnu and the Wei Kingdom.
